6:
WITH cust_2013 AS (
  SELECT c.CustomerID, c.Segment, SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
  FROM customers c
  JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
  WHERE substr(ym.Date,1,4) = '2013' AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
  GROUP BY c.CustomerID, c.Segment
),
seg_min AS (
  SELECT Segment, MIN(total_consumption) AS min_total
  FROM cust_2013
  GROUP BY Segment
),
min_cust AS (
  SELECT c2013.CustomerID, c2013.Segment, c2013.total_consumption
  FROM cust_2013 c2013
  JOIN seg_min s ON c2013.Segment = s.Segment AND c2013.total_consumption = s.min_total
),
seg_avg AS (
  SELECT Segment,
         SUM(total_consumption) AS sum_total,
         COUNT(*) AS cnt,
         (SUM(total_consumption) * 1.0) / COUNT(*) AS avg_consumption
  FROM min_cust
  GROUP BY Segment
)
SELECT
  MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='SME' THEN avg_consumption END) -
  MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='LAM' THEN avg_consumption END) AS diff_SME_LAM,
  MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='LAM' THEN avg_consumption END) -
  MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='KAM' THEN avg_consumption END) AS diff_LAM_KAM,
  MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='KAM' THEN avg_consumption END) -
  MAX(CASE WHEN Segment='SME' THEN avg_consumption END) AS diff_KAM_SME
FROM seg_avg;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
7:
WITH yearly AS (
    SELECT c.Segment,
           substr(ym.Date,1,4) AS yr,
           SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
    FROM customers c
    JOIN yearmonth ym ON c.CustomerID = ym.CustomerID
    WHERE c.Currency = 'EUR'
      AND substr(ym.Date,1,4) IN ('2012','2013')
      AND c.Segment IN ('SME','LAM','KAM')
    GROUP BY c.Segment, yr
),
pivot AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           MAX(CASE WHEN yr='2012' THEN total_consumption END) AS cons_2012,
           MAX(CASE WHEN yr='2013' THEN total_consumption END) AS cons_2013
    FROM yearly
    GROUP BY Segment
),
pct AS (
    SELECT Segment,
           ((cons_2013 - cons_2012) * 100.0) / cons_2013 AS pct_increase
    FROM pivot
    WHERE cons_2013 IS NOT NULL AND cons_2012 IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT 
    (SELECT Segment FROM pct ORDER BY pct_increase DESC LIMIT 1) AS biggest_increase_segment,
    (SELECT Segment FROM pct ORDER BY pct_increase ASC LIMIT 1) AS lowest_increase_segment;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

218:
WITH race AS (
    SELECT raceId
    FROM races
    WHERE year = 2008
      AND name = 'Australian Grand Prix'
),
champ AS (
    SELECT r.time AS champ_time
    FROM results r
    JOIN race ON r.raceId = race.raceId
    WHERE r.position = 1
      AND r.time IS NOT NULL
),
last AS (
    SELECT r.time AS last_time
    FROM results r
    JOIN race ON r.raceId = race.raceId
    WHERE r.time IS NOT NULL
    ORDER BY r.positionOrder DESC
    LIMIT 1
),
parsed AS (
    SELECT
        champ_time,
        last_time,
        -- champion parts
        CASE WHEN INSTR(champ_time, ':')>0 THEN SUBSTR(champ_time,1,INSTR(champ_time,':')-1) ELSE '0' END AS champ_min,
        CASE WHEN INSTR(champ_time, ':')>0 THEN SUBSTR(champ_time,INSTR(champ_time,':')+1) ELSE champ_time END AS champ_rem1,
        CASE WHEN INSTR(
                CASE WHEN INSTR(champ_time, ':')>0 THEN SUBSTR(champ_time,INSTR(champ_time,':')+1) ELSE champ_time END,
                '.')>0
             THEN SUBSTR(
                     CASE WHEN INSTR(champ_time, ':')>0 THEN SUBSTR(champ_time,INSTR(champ_time,':')+1) ELSE champ_time END,
                     1,
                     INSTR(
                         CASE WHEN INSTR(champ_time, ':')>0 THEN SUBSTR(champ_time,INSTR(champ_time,':')+1) ELSE champ_time END,
                         '.')-1)
             ELSE
                 CASE WHEN INSTR(champ_time, ':')>0 THEN SUBSTR(champ_time,INSTR(champ_time,':')+1) ELSE champ_time END
        END AS champ_sec,
        CASE WHEN INSTR(
                CASE WHEN INSTR(champ_time, ':')>0 THEN SUBSTR(champ_time,INSTR(champ_time,':')+1) ELSE champ_time END,
                '.')>0
             THEN SUBSTR(
                     CASE WHEN INSTR(champ_time, ':')>0 THEN SUBSTR(champ_time,INSTR(champ_time,':')+1) ELSE champ_time END,
                     INSTR(
                         CASE WHEN INSTR(champ_time, ':')>0 THEN SUBSTR(champ_time,INSTR(champ_time,':')+1) ELSE champ_time END,
                         '.')+1)
             ELSE '0'
        END AS champ_ms_part,
        -- last driver parts
        CASE WHEN INSTR(last_time, ':')>0 THEN SUBSTR(last_time,1,INSTR(last_time,':')-1) ELSE '0' END AS last_min,
        CASE WHEN INSTR(last_time, ':')>0 THEN SUBSTR(last_time,INSTR(last_time,':')+1) ELSE last_time END AS last_rem1,
        CASE WHEN INSTR(
                CASE WHEN INSTR(last_time, ':')>0 THEN SUBSTR(last_time,INSTR(last_time,':')+1) ELSE last_time END,
                '.')>0
             THEN SUBSTR(
                     CASE WHEN INSTR(last_time, ':')>0 THEN SUBSTR(last_time,INSTR(last_time,':')+1) ELSE last_time END,
                     1,
                     INSTR(
                         CASE WHEN INSTR(last_time, ':')>0 THEN SUBSTR(last_time,INSTR(last_time,':')+1) ELSE last_time END,
                         '.')-1)
             ELSE
                 CASE WHEN INSTR(last_time, ':')>0 THEN SUBSTR(last_time,INSTR(last_time,':')+1) ELSE last_time END
        END AS last_sec,
        CASE WHEN INSTR(
                CASE WHEN INSTR(last_time, ':')>0 THEN SUBSTR(last_time,INSTR(last_time,':')+1) ELSE last_time END,
                '.')>0
             THEN SUBSTR(
                     CASE WHEN INSTR(last_time, ':')>0 THEN SUBSTR(last_time,INSTR(last_time,':')+1) ELSE last_time END,
                     INSTR(
                         CASE WHEN INSTR(last_time, ':')>0 THEN SUBSTR(last_time,INSTR(last_time,':')+1) ELSE last_time END,
                         '.')+1)
             ELSE '0'
        END AS last_ms_part
    FROM champ, last
),
ms AS (
    SELECT
        ((CAST(champ_min AS INTEGER)*60 + CAST(champ_sec AS INTEGER))*1000 + CAST(champ_ms_part AS INTEGER)) AS champ_ms,
        ((CAST(last_min AS INTEGER)*60 + CAST(last_sec AS INTEGER))*1000 + CAST(last_ms_part AS INTEGER)) AS last_ms
    FROM parsed
)
SELECT
    CAST(((last_ms - champ_ms) - champ_ms) AS REAL) * 100.0 / last_ms AS percentage_faster
FROM ms;	----- bird -----	formula_1

  FROM loan
  WHERE date = '1993-07-05'
  ORDER BY loan_id ASC
  LIMIT 1
),

  SELECT balance
  FROM trans
  WHERE account_id = (SELECT account_id FROM first_loan)
    AND date = '1993-03-22'
  ORDER BY trans_id DESC
  LIMIT 1
),
end_bal AS (
  SELECT balance
  FROM trans

    AND date = '1998-12-27'
  ORDER BY trans_id DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
